description:
Add a theme switcher in settings with Light, Dark, and System-follow options. Persist the preference across sessions and devices.

**Rationale:** Standard modern UX expectation. Reduces eye strain for users working in low-light environments and improves perceived polish.
title: Dark Mode Theme Toggle
